title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Apollo Telehealth! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
